title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Swiggy family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
